title: Experts call for advanced diagnostics, AI tools to improve industrial asset life assessment
description: Jamshedpur, Apr 10 (PTI) Scientists underlined the rising need for advanced diagnostic tools, predictive modelling and integrated assessment techniques to ensure the safety, reliability and cost-effective operation of industrial assets, during a two-day national symposium here. The symposium on ‘Remaining Life Assessment of Engineering Components (RLA-2026)’ was held at the CSIR-National Metallurgical Laboratory (NML), Jamshedpur […]
